**[6/10]  Script/Hack Account Handling Instructions**

Keeper,
To ensure the safety of everyone's information and assets, as well as a fair gaming environment, the "Morimens" operation team will continue to crack down on accounts that improperly profit from using scripts, cheats, exploits, and illegal transactions. (For example: initial accounts or self-draw accounts that use scripts to farm rewards.) For accounts detected to have engaged in the above behaviors recently, due to the serious impact on the fairness of the game environment, we will impose a permanent ban as a penalty.
For Keepers who have purchased such dangerous accounts and have made top-ups resulting in losses, we will provide order transfer services: You can contact customer service using the banned account and provide screenshots of your top-up orders and other required information as instructed. We will assist Keepers in transferring valid orders to the new account you provide. (The creation time of the new account must be after your feedback to customer service.)

We once again call on the Keepers to protect your account and asset security. Please do not engage in account trading and safeguard your account information properly.
 
[6/10 Ban List (Partial)]

守密人你好：
       弥萨格大学校务处将于6月10日13:45(UTC+8) 进行校内设施修复，更新完成后您将得到通知，重新进入游戏。对于更新可能给大家带来的不便，我们会准备一份补给物资以示歉意。祝大家调查顺利！ 
  
【补给物资】
在线维护补偿：银芯×50
  
【领取条件】
领取时间截至2026年6月24日23:59。请记得及时前往邮箱领取补给物资哦。  
 
【更新内容】

一、故事
【秘典书库】
● 「留声机」中新增了专辑「蒲公英去往何处」。

● 「影像」中新增了「被遗忘的爱之种」系列剧情 CG，以及 3 个相应场景 CG。

【繁衍狂热】
● 「沙耶」的「繁衍狂热」剧情中的部分文本得到了更新。

【对战表情】
● 「沙耶之歌」系列中的以下对战表情调整：
    ○ 「认知偏差」：名称调整为「打牌」，描述调整为「猜猜我下一张会出什么？」。
    ○ 「蒲公英」：名称调整为「飞飞」。

二、问题修复
【故事】
● 唤醒体档案
    ○ 修复了唤醒体「沙耶」的「受击·一」语音会错误地随机播放多个受击语音的问题。
    ○ 修复了唤醒体「沙耶」的「受击·三」、「受击·四」、「受击·五」语音未在「语音-日常」中展示的问题。
    ○ 修复了唤醒体「泰旖丝」的「特殊技能·二」、「特殊技能·三」未在「语音-战斗」中展示的问题。

● 本地化
    ○ 简体中文
        ■ 修复了命轮「樱花下的迷思」故事中「微笑」误写为「好笑」的问题。
    ○ 繁体中文
        ■ 修复了「相位对弈」中造物「阿方索之器」效果描述中缺少「脑中之音」的问题。
    ○ 英语
        ■ 修复了 10 余处剧情文本中拼写错误、角色台词风格不统一的问题。
        ■ 修复了 600 余处技能、状态、造物、命轮描述中，大小写和拼写措辞不规范的问题。
        ■ 修复了多处敌人的技能描述中错误地使用第二人称的问题。
        ■ 修复了唤醒活动「夙愿的回响」的唤醒类型「缚誓之谕」翻译不统一的问题。
    ○ 韩语
        ■ 修复了唤醒体「沙耶」的天赋「繁育净土」描述翻译错误的问题。
    ○ 日语
        ■ 修复了钥令「献给新世界」的描述中护盾数值未能显示的问题。

【战斗】
● 通用
    ○ 修复了部分敌人在战斗中可能会出现异常紫色图块的问题。

● 钥令
    ○ 修复了钥令「献给新世界」描述错误的问题。修复后为：抽取技能卡而非指令卡。

● 战斗统计（Beta）
    ○ 修复了命轮「以蔷薇之名」造成的伤害未计入战斗统计的问题。
**V2.5.1.5 Online Maintenance Announcement**

Dear Keeper,
The Mythag Administration Office will conduct campus facility maintenance on  June 10, 2026 at 13:45(UTC+8) . You will be notified once the update is complete and you can re-enter the game. As an apology for any inconvenience caused by the update, we will provide a supply package. Wishing everyone a successful investigation!
   
[Compensation]
Online Maintenance Compensation: Silver×50
   
[Claim Conditions]
The claiming time ends on June 24, 2026 at 23:59. Please remember to go to your mailox in time to claim the supply materials.
   
[Update Content]

I. Story
[Library]
● A new album, "Where Does the Dandelion Go," has been added to the "Phonograph."
● Added the "Forgotten Seed of Love" series Story CG and 3 corresponding scene CGs to "Gallery."
[Reproduction Frenzy]
● Some text in the "Saya" "Reproduction Frenzy" Story has been updated.
[Traphase Emote]
● The following Traphase Emotes from the "Song of Saya" series have been adjusted:
○ "Cognitive Bias": Name changed to "Card Play," description changed to "Guess what I'll play next?"
○ "Dandelion": Name adjusted to "Fifi".

2. Bug Fixes
[Story]
● Awakener Profile
○ Fixed an issue where the "Hit: I" voice line for the Awakener "Saya" would incorrectly play multiple random hit voice lines.
○ Fixed an issue where the "Hit: III," "Hit: IV," and "Hit: V" voice lines for the Awakener "Saya" were not displayed in "Voice - Daily."
○ Fixed an issue where the "Special Skill: II" and "Special Skill: III" of the Awakener "Thais" were not displayed in "Voice - Battle".

● Localization
○ Simplified Chinese
■ Fixed an issue in the Wheel of Destiny "Sakura Reveries" story where "smile" was incorrectly written as "funny."
○ Traditional Chinese
■ Fixed an issue where "Voices in Your Head" was missing from the Effect description of the Relic "Alfonso's Artifact" in "Traphase".
○ English
■ Fixed over 10 instances of spelling errors and inconsistent character dialogue styles in Story text.
■ Fixed 600+ issues with inconsistent capitalization and spelling in the descriptions of Skills, States, Relics, and Wheels of Destiny.
■ Fixed an issue where second-person pronouns were incorrectly used in multiple enemy skill descriptions.
■ Fixed an issue where the Awakening type "Oathbound Oracle" in the Awakening Event "Echoing Wishes" had inconsistent translations.
○ Korean
■ Fixed an issue where the Talent "Eden of Propagation" description for the Awakener "Saya" had an incorrect translation.
○ Japanese
■ Fixed an issue where the Shield value was not displaying in the description of the Posse "For the New World".

[Combat]
● General
○ Fixed an issue where some enemies could display abnormal purple tiles during combat.

● Posse
○ Fixed an issue where the Posse "For the New World" had an incorrect description. After the fix: draws Skill Cards instead of Command Cards.

● Combat Stats (Beta)
○ Fixed an issue where DMG dealt by the Wheel of Destiny "By Rose Alone" was not counted in combat statistics.

<@1376763322568937562> is KRS (ayla1425) really in charge of Korean? Even within Discord, there has been no activity since November last year, and I haven't seen KRS speak Korean. It's such a contrast to other volunteers communicating in Korean to get their opinions on the appropriate translation.
thread_title: Community Translators: Round 2 is Open! (繁體中文 added!) 本地化志愿者第二轮招募！

content:
<@1376763322568937562> I also want to add my opinion on this matter.

For the past 10 months, Ayla has not made any contribution, nor even spoke or interacted in the volunteer Discord server. I completely understand not everyone has the time to actively contribute to the localization project, and personal schedules or circumstances may change unexpectedly. I do not mean to blame anyone for not contributing.

However, while several new community translators for EN, RU, etc were recruited, no new Korean volunteers were recruited. 
I understand that BIAV and Ace are relatively small teams and that expanding the localization team may not always be feasible. That said, there are many Korean players who are eager to contribute to improving the localization and have submitted the volunteer form, yet did not get a response.

**My concern is that this situation may give the impression that an inactive member is 'taking up space' that could otherwise be filled by an active contributor.**

Since BIAV is likely aware of the rapidly growing interest from the Korean player base, can we know if BIAV is willing to consider recruiting a few more Korean community translators?
If that is not possible, I would at least appreciate understanding the reasoning behind that decision.
thread_title: Community Translators: Round 2 is Open! (繁體中文 added!) 本地化志愿者第二轮招募！
